text.title: outcome-based-roadmaps-advanced Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for outcome-based-roadmaps-advanced as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Outcomes assigned confidence=medium or confidence=high without cited evidence. Agent defaults to "medium" because it sounds reasonable.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Uncalibrated confidence is opinion. Every confidence assertion must reference a query, dashboard URL, or an explicit "TO BE INSTRUMENTED" flag. Without it, the confidence column provides false precision that misleads planning.

failure-mode.description: An audience view is edited directly rather than regenerated from the source of truth, causing the four views to diverge and contradict each other.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Direct edits to views break the single-source principle. When board and engineering views disagree, stakeholders lose confidence in all four. Run a daily diff job to flag lines in views without a source-of-truth trace.

failure-mode.description: A business goal decomposed into 6-8 outcomes because every stakeholder's priority gets included.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: More outcomes = less focus = slower experiments = longer time-to-learn. The hard cap at 4 exists precisely because stakeholder pressure tends toward expansion. A PM must own the decomposition decision and defend the cap.

failure-mode.description: Sales pressure causes specific features and dates to appear in the board view or customer view for items that are below high confidence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Sales pressure is a political problem, not a roadmap format problem. Outcome framing reduces but does not eliminate it. Solving it requires agreement on which view each audience receives and enforcement of view boundaries by the PM.
